## How was it tested?

<!-- Check all that apply: -->

- [ ] `pytest` runs clean locally (200/200)
- [ ] `python -m benchmarks.system_test --quick` shows expected pain points only
- [ ] New tests added for new behavior
- [ ] Cross-validation against an existing engine (where applicable)
- [ ] `ruff check` and `black --check` are clean

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything tricky? Anything you're unsure about? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Added a line to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated README if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No `eval`, `exec`, `pickle`, `subprocess`, or `shell=True` in new code
